  as={"h1"}

  children={"Cash Payment Acknowledgement (Deprecated)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/cash-payment/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**⚠️ DEPRECATED**: This endpoint (`cash-payment/`) is deprecated and will be removed in future releases.<br/>Please migrate to the new endpoint at `payment/cash/` for acknowledging cash payments.<br/><br/>This endpoint handles cash payment acknowledgement requests.<br/>📝 **NOTE**: Optional fields may not be represented in the response body.
### Permissions

| Auth Method | Required Permissions |
|---|---|
| [API Key](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#api-key-auth) | All permissions (admin access) |


<span style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location 'https://ksa.ottu.dev/b/pbl/v2/cash-payment/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data '{\n  \"session_id\": \"string\"\n}'"}</span>
